overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long NBIS Daily ETF (NBIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Nebius Group N.V. stock. NBIL was launched on Oct 7, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
